description: MG996R metal-gear servo — parametric functional EOL test (commanded move + measured response).

functional.comment: Limits are per-measurement spec windows. The instrument reports raw readings; the host checks them against these. Tune to your golden-sample population.

station.comment: Single-board ESP32-CAM (as MCU): functional + HMI over one USB serial (mcu_port). Servo PWM on GPIO13; I2C (SDA=14, SCL=15) shared by OLED 0x3c, AS5600 0x36, INA219 0x40.
